seconds_v2.desc: Five paper-stripped crayons in magenta, grey, blue, green and gold lie on a white surface with shredded paper wrapper scraps scattered around them
The five bare crayons rest in a neat row, peeled clean of their paper labels
The crayons have been snapped into many short chunks, the colored pieces scattered loosely across the white surface
Broken crayon segments in magenta, grey, blue, green and gold lie jumbled together on the table
Close view of the pile of broken crayon pieces sorted roughly by color
Some crayon chunks regrouped, with pink and grey pieces clustered and green and gold whole tips set apart
Five longer crayon pieces lined up again by color, magenta to gold, with a faint paper scrap behind
Scene cuts to five empty decorative paper cups with pastel animal prints standing in a row on a counter as candle containers
A hand with green-painted nails reaches in to adjust one of the patterned paper cups in the row

windows.summary_v2: The finished multicolored layered crayon candles in glass jars are revealed and shown displayed on a counter beside the crayons used to make them.

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of a finished candle in a rounded glass jar showing horizontal layers of tan, green, blue, grey and pink wax with a centered wick
The layered rainbow candle fills the frame, its gold, green, teal, grey and pink wax bands clearly visible through the glass
Tight view of the multicolored striped wax layers in the glass jar, ending in a pink band at the base
Camera pulls back to show two layered candles in glass tumblers on a granite counter, with loose Crayola crayons and heart-shaped wax pieces nearby
Two finished striped candles sit on the counter beside a bundle of colorful crayons and a wrought-iron stand holding a red plate
Wider shot showing several rainbow layered candles in glass jars arranged on the counter among scattered crayons
Overlaid dissolve frame of crayons and a candle, with branded Crayola crayons and a glass candle on the granite surface
A bundle of Crayola crayons lies beside an orange tealight and a tall layered candle in a glass on the counter
Final view of scattered Crayola crayons, an orange candle and a striped rainbow candle in a glass tumbler on the granite counter

seconds_v2.desc: A lit candle in a glass jar burns with a tall flame, its green-tinted surface beginning to form a melt pool, blurred crayons and another candle behind

The candle burns on, the green surface glowing translucent near the growing molten pool
